providers.description: OpenRouter unified AI API provider for image and video generation models.
Internal TodoX image/avatar creative render provider.
YEScale async task image provider. Credentials must come from secret store/environment.
YEScale async task video provider. Runtime credential comes from environment.
KIE provider for Kling motion-control video. Phase 1 disabled by default; API key must come from environment/secret store.

capabilities.description: Generate avatar images using OpenRouter image models.
Generate chibi avatar images using OpenRouter image models.
Generate reusable AI character master images using OpenRouter image models.
Generate posters or thumbnails using OpenRouter image models.
Generate service thumbnails using OpenRouter image models.
Create video from text prompt and optional reference image using OpenRouter Video API.
Create video from prompt plus reference image/frame using OpenRouter Video API.
Generate avatar images using internal ImageAICreativeRender provider.
Generate chibi avatars using internal ImageAICreativeRender provider.
Generate reusable AI character master images using internal ImageAICreativeRender provider.
Create images from text prompts and optional reference images using OpenRouter Image API.
Render static scene images using internal ImageAICreativeRender provider.
Render scene video from the selected image using YEScale Omni Flash.

notes: Credential secret_value and secret_json are intentionally excluded.
This export is safe to commit because it stores only metadata/reference fields.
